programs.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programs.sub_title: David vs. Goliath: Can They Do That?
programs.desc: A previously eliminated team member makes a triumphant return; a rookie truck's plan to take out a pro rival backfires, while a pro team that's been on the bottom climbs the rankings; chef Antonia Lofaso returns with a challenge of her own.

programs.title: Alex vs. America
programs.desc: Host Eric Adjepong introduces three skilled chefs from California, Texas and North Carolina to take a shot at knocking chef Alex Guarnaschelli out of the top spot while taking on a favorite ingredient of America: cheese.

programs.title: Alex vs. America
programs.desc: Three seasoned dessert chefs from California, Washington and Texas challenge chef Alex Guarnaschelli in two sweet rounds of cooking hosted by Eric Adjepong; it's up to judges Sherry Yard and Dahlia Narvaez to decide on the winner.

programs.title: Alex vs. America
programs.desc: Welcoming chefs from Arizona, New Mexico and Texas to show Alex the best of the Southwest.

programs.title: Alex vs. America
programs.desc: Eric Adjepong welcomes chefs Ray Garcia, Claudette Zepeda and Gustavo Romero to battle with Alex Guarnaschelli over Mexican cuisine; judges Daniela Soto-Innes and Bricia Lopez determine if the expert chefs are too spicy for Alex to handle.

programs.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programs.desc: Eric Adjepong hosts a night of winner-takes-all culinary poker as Maneet Chauhan returns to defend her winning title against Mei Lin and Aaron Sanchez; the knives are sharpened, the heat is on, and only one legendary chef will walk away with $30,000.
